#  Link Observations to a Drawing (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Drawings AND Observations tools.
  * This action can be performed offline. Tasks performed offline sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing that you want to add an observation to.
  4. In the markup toolbar, tap the shape or line that you want to add to the drawing. See [Mark up a Drawing (iOS).](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)_  
Note:_ This markup will be associated with the new observation.
  5. Tap **Link**.
  6. Tap **Link an Observation**.
  7. Choose one of the following options:
     * **Link an Existing Observation** :1. Tap to select an existing observation item to add to the markup.
     * **Create a new Observation** :
       1. Tap ![Icon Plus Quick Create Mobile2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a27be202634839c76584fe365cc247fb/1c03472023e1b0974c6f7b58a4235d9d/icon-plus-quick-create-mobile2.png?fm=webp&h=20) to create a new observation.
       2. Tap to select an existing template, or tap **+ Create Without Template**.
       3. Complete the necessary information.
       4. Tap **Save** to add the new item to the markup.
  8. To publish your changes, tap the markup, then tap **Publish**.   
See [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


## See Also
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
  * [Add Observations to a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/add-observations-to-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Mark Up a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)
title: Link Observations to a Drawing (iOS)
description: How to add observations to a drawing on the Procore iOS app.
